_description: Master doc — auto-injected into every conversation with this agent
title: X Content Guidelines
content:
# X Content Guidelines

## Brand Voice
- Professional but approachable
- Data-driven claims when possible
- Authentic — avoid corporate speak

## Content Pillars
1. **Educational**: Teach something actionable
2. **Behind the scenes**: Show the process
3. **Community**: Engage and respond
4. **Promotional**: Max 20% of posts

## Posting Rules
- Never post without proofreading
- Always include a CTA
- Max 3 hashtags per post
- No posts about politics, religion, or competitors

## Approval Flow
- Standard posts: Self-approve
- Controversial topics: Manager approval required
- Partnership posts: Legal review required

_description: Supplementary doc — detailed reference, not auto-injected
title: X Algorithm Best Practices 2026
content:
# X Algorithm Best Practices

## Ranking Signals
| Signal | Weight | Description |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| Replies | High | Conversations boost reach |
| Bookmarks | High | Indicates valuable content |
| Dwell time | Medium | Time spent reading |
| Reposts | Medium | Amplification |
| Profile clicks | Medium | Interest signal |
| Likes | Low | Basic engagement |

## Best Posting Times (EST)
- Mon-Fri: 8-10 AM, 12-1 PM, 5-7 PM
- Saturday: 9-11 AM
- Sunday: 10 AM-12 PM

## Thread Performance Tips
- Threads get 2-3x more impressions than single posts
- First tweet hook determines 80% of thread performance
- Optimal thread length: 5-10 tweets
- Include a visual every 3-4 tweets
